fundamentals.name: ProShares Ultra VIX Short-Term Futures ETF
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The index seeks to offer exposure to market volatility through publicly traded futures markets and is designed to measure the implied volatility of the S&P 500 over 30 days in the future.

news.paragraph: UVXY, a leveraged ETF designed to track volatility, is highlighted as one of ten leveraged ETFs built to lose value. This suggests a bearish outlook for the instrument, likely due to its inherent decay and the specific market conditions or strategies that make it prone to underperformance over time. Investors considering UVXY should be aware of its structure and the high probability of value erosion.

headlines.title: Stop Trading These 10 Leveraged ETFs Built to Lose
